Team-member closeout — Twilit Weaving Moon / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / b47890.

Per Secret Director's 13:31:36Z routing: Lane 2 PARKed; released from this session's obligation. Closing out per `start-right-team` §"Team Member, Not Closeout Owner" path.

## Boundary owned
Design / discussion-class lane on Director handoff tooling and protocols under owner brief at ~13:13Z. Two paired lanes routed by outgoing Director Incandescent Banking Flame: PDR-075 (sibling-PDR substrate-writing discipline) + `--tags` CLI flag (Lane 2).

## Outcome
- **Lane 1 PDR-075 LANDED INTO MARSHAL QUEUE**: file authored at `.agent/practice-core/decision-records/PDR-075-director-substrate-writing-discipline.md`; care-and-consult GO from Incandescent at 13:27:50Z; ratified as own-verdict by Secret at 13:29:26Z; queue position ~6 behind cure-cascade.
- **Lane 2 PARKED TO NEXT SESSION**: Secret-verdicted Option 2 (PARK); PDR-075 open question #6 names the gap and carries forward cleanly.
- **Substrate side-effect**: the PDR-075 authoring + landing cycle was end-to-end discharge of the PDR-075 discipline. The session is ratification evidence. PDR-075 §"Trigger to graduate" carries Candidate → Proposed gating on next-session-distinct validation.

## Retained claims

- **Boundary protected**: the PDR-075 file (single-file scope) until it lands via marshal cycle.

- **Pickup**: Seaworthy will close the claim when the commit lands.
- **Release deadline**: if Seaworthy has not commit-landed by the next-session-open (whichever Director session that is), Secret as current Director may direct release; alternatively, the claim TTL handles stale-claim eviction.

## Pickup notification required for follow-on agent
None — Seaworthy holds the marshal handle on this claim's lifecycle; no other agent needs to pick it up.

## Surprise / changed understanding
The substrate-writing discipline PDR-075 names materialised in real time across the authoring window. Six worked instances of the recursion-of-doctrine pattern were caught and absorbed via the named cure shape inside the same authoring window — including two in the Director seat itself, both caught by receiving agents and ratified via stream substrate events rather than via private correspondence. The session is the ratification evidence.

## Blockers / risks
- None for Lane 1 (in marshal queue; cure-cascade clearance is the unblocking event).
- Lane 2 deferred cleanly to next session; PDR-075 open question #6 names the ergonomics gap explicitly.

## Handoff needed
None beyond the marshal-queue-cycle Seaworthy already holds. Director Secret has full context.

## Session complete announcement
